prompt:
This Adams CMD script has several bugs. Find and fix all of them.

```
model cre model_name = .pendulum

defaults units length = mm mass = kg

part cre rig nam &
    part_name = .pendulum.link &
    location  = 0.0, 0.0, 0.0

part create rigid_body mass_properties &
    part_name             = .pendulum.link &
    adams_id              = 3 &
    mass                  = 1.0 &
    center_of_mass_marker = .pendulum.link.cm &
    ixx                   = 3333.0 &
    iyy                   = 3333.0 &
    izz                   = 100.0

marker create &
    marker_name = pendulum.link.pin_mkr &
    location    = 0.0, 0.0, 0.0

constraint create joint revolute &
    joint_name    = .pendulum.rev_pin &
    i_marker_name = pendulum.link.pin_mkr &
    j_marker_name = .pendulum.ground.pin_j_mkr
```

assertions.text: Identifies and corrects 'model cre' to 'model create' (abbreviated keyword)
Identifies and corrects 'part cre rig nam' to 'part create rigid_body name_and_position'
Identifies that 'part create rigid_body mass_properties' should be 'part modify rigid_body mass_properties'
Identifies and removes 'adams_id = 3' — manually assigning adams_id is never correct
Identifies and removes 'center_of_mass_marker = .pendulum.link.cm' — the cm marker does not exist yet; Adams creates it automatically
Identifies that 'pendulum.link.pin_mkr' is missing the leading dot and corrects to '.pendulum.link.pin_mkr' (appears in both marker create and constraint create)
